entities.name: Fitbit

entities.name: workouts database
entities.context: SQLite database table storing canonical workout records with fields like date, duration, modality, heart rate

entities.name: workout sync pipeline
entities.context: Logic that merges Fitbit-sourced workouts into a canonical workouts table, updating existing or inserting new records

relationships.context: Fitbit workout data is matched and merged into the canonical workouts table

Pipeline performs UPDATE or INSERT operations against the workouts table
